author: bll123
text: mid3v2 command line : colon in tag data

author: bll123
text:
The tag's : character is getting re-mapped and quotes are added.  
Is this what it is supposed to do?  
I think I recall the : character being somewhat special.

```
bll-tecra:bll$ mid3v2 --UFID 'http://example.com=abc-def' waltz.mp3
bll-tecra:bll$ mutagen-inspect waltz.mp3
-- waltz.mp3
- MPEG 1 layer 3, 128000 bps (CBR, LAME 3.99.1+, -b 128), 44100 Hz, 2 chn, 20.85 seconds (audio/mp3)
UFID=http='//example.com=abc-def'
```

author: bll123
text:
This is what MusicBrainz Picard puts in:

`UFID=http://musicbrainz.org='2409871f-6cde-42a1-a017-722b86f87e68'`

author: bll123
text:
Looks like this is the proper way to do it:

`mid3v2 -e --delete-frames=UFID --UFID "http\://example.com:abc-def" test.mp3`
